name: PSPDFKit API
what_it_does: Document processing API for PDF generation from HTML, form filling, digital signatures, annotations, and watermarking.
use_cases: Generating branded PDFs from HTML templates (invoices, reports, contracts)
Filling PDF forms programmatically with structured data
Applying digital signatures to documents in automated workflows
Adding annotations, stamps, and watermarks to PDFs
Converting Office documents to PDF with high fidelity
not_for: Simple PDF merge/split — overkill for basic operations
High-volume OCR workloads — not the primary strength
Self-hosted deployment without a commercial license
best_when: An agent needs to generate polished, branded PDFs from HTML templates or automate document signing and form filling workflows.
avoid_when: You only need basic PDF operations like merge or compress — ilovepdf-api is simpler and cheaper for those use cases.

auth.notes: Single API key passed as Authorization header. Straightforward for agents — no token refresh needed. Key is generated in the PSPDFKit dashboard.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 100 API calls free per month on trial
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-operation pricing starting around $0.05–$0.10 per document operation; enterprise plans available
pricing.notes: Trial tier available without credit card. Production pricing is per-operation. Enterprise contracts available for high-volume use.

performance.rate_limits: Varies by plan; concurrent request limits apply

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HTTP status codes with JSON error bodies; errors include descriptive messages for common failures like invalid HTML or unsupported file types
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Each API call generates a new document — no idempotency key support. Agents should implement their own deduplication logic before calling.
known_agent_gotchas: HTML-to-PDF rendering depends on PSPDFKit's internal rendering engine — CSS support may differ from browser rendering
Large HTML templates with external resources (fonts, images) can increase latency significantly
Document size limits apply — very large PDFs may need chunking
Digital signature workflows require certificate configuration upfront
No idempotency support means duplicate document generation on agent retries

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Simple API key auth — no scope granularity. Documents processed in PSPDFKit's cloud infrastructure and not retained. SOC2 compliant. EU data residency available.
